title: Which Angel would you be
wikitext:
[]: Which Angel would you be?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:20 am I used the Search bar and I got nothing. If you can be any Angel which one would you be? For me I would be Sachiel or Armisael.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:23 am hmmm.... Armiseal. Seems pretty cool. Or Leliel, that would be cool also.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:57 am Either Sachiel or Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Thu Mar 26, 2009 9:13 am Sachiel, he seems to be the most adaptable. And being amphibious would be cool. The fact that he has hands is a definite plus, too. And that ability to grow a halo at will in 1.0, that's something I would find incredibly useful at times.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Mar 26, 2009 10:04 am Leliel/Arael/Armisael.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Mar 26, 2009 4:34 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Mar 26, 2009 5:18 pm zeruel, i'd never run out of toiletpaper

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Thu Mar 26, 2009 5:38 pm Areal. You can only be killed by a LoL, plus you get some sweet theme music .

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 26, 2009 5:55 pm Though not technically an Angel by Adam's kids standards, Lilith. Then I can tang people and die an epic death.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Thu Mar 26, 2009 6:01 pm Tabris.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Mar 26, 2009 6:53 pm Without the risk of being killed. I'd like to be Bardiel or Armiseal.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Mar 26, 2009 9:06 pm I wonder if angels could date.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Thu Mar 26, 2009 9:08 pm they date me. srsly. [/lieicouldnvrgetadate]

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Thu Mar 26, 2009 9:13 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: I wonder if angels could date.

[]: Re: Which Angel would you be?             Quote Post by Chowwow » Thu Mar 26, 2009 10:15 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: If you can be any Angel which one would you be?

[]:             Quote Post by Tsachoul » Thu Mar 26, 2009 10:24 pm leliel. Or perhaps Zerual.

[]: Re: Which Angel would you be?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Mar 27, 2009 8:53 am Chowwow wrote: Guyver Spawn wrote: If you can be any Angel which one would you be?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Mar 27, 2009 10:08 am I'm leaning towards (rebuild) Ramiel. A shape-shifting, levitating doom cannon is pretty damned sweet any way you look at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Fri Mar 27, 2009 8:18 pm Arael or Ireul

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Mar 28, 2009 11:43 am fem-kaworu

Article: Which Angel would you be
[]: Which Angel would you be?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:20 am I used the Search bar and I got nothing. If you can be any Angel which one would you be? For me I would be Sachiel or Armisael.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:23 am hmmm.... Armiseal. Seems pretty cool. Or Leliel, that would be cool also.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Mar 26, 2009 7:57 am Either Sachiel or Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Thu Mar 26, 2009 9:13 am Sachiel, he seems to be the most adaptable. And being amphibious would be cool. The fact that he has hands is a definite plus, too. And that ability to grow a halo at will in 1.0, that's something I would find incredibly useful at times.
